description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a robust, metallic body and a short, wide barrel. The main body is constructed from dark, weathered metal, showing signs of wear and use, with several bolts and mechanical details visible along its surface. The grip is made of polished wood with a smooth, ergonomic contour and visible grain patterns, providing a striking contrast to the metal components. The trigger and trigger guard are integrated into the frame, with the guard being rounded and substantial for finger protection. The front of the barrel is reinforced and features a prominent muzzle, while the rear includes a hammer and mechanical details typical of a revolver-style action. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for urban environments where compactness and durability are valued.
description: A compact, metallic shotgun with a weathered finish and a polished wooden grip, featuring a short, wide barrel and robust mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and reinforced barrel tip, with the metallic body dominating the silhouette.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full profile, including the wooden grip, trigger guard, and detailed mechanical components along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden grip's ergonomic shape and the alignment of the barrel and hammer mechanism.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the metallic body, grip, and additional mechanical details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and wide with reinforced muzzle, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
